trusted_seed.role: audited C11 artifact used to start the Kofun-written compiler

stage1.role: Kofun-written compiler for the documented arithmetic Core subset

stage2_frontend_checkpoint.role: Kofun lexer, structural parser, bounded recovery, textual IR, deterministic source projection, and checked Int/Bool Core with control flow plus immutable List[Int] literal/index lowering to C11; not an executable self-recompile

native_checkpoint.role: Kofun-authored ELF64/x86-64 encoder with absolute and rel32 fixups, Core-shaped executable images, mmap bump allocation, heap Text, and checked fixed plus variable-length immutable List[Int] fixtures

stage2.implementation: stage1 compiles its own source and reproduces an equivalent artifact

truthful_status: The repository contains a Python-free Kofun-written compiler seed plus executable Stage 2 typed Core/control-flow/List-indexing, native ELF/Core/allocator/Text/List, syscall, strict UTF-8 Text-reference, immutable Bytes-reference, and immutable List-reference checkpoints. It is not fully self-hosting: Stage 1 cannot semantically rebuild its complete source, and the native and built-in library checkpoints are not general backend wiring.
